entries.definition:
وَأَيْدِيَكُمْ عَنْهُمْ بِبَطْنِ مَكَّةَ He it was who restrained their hands from you,
and your hands from them in the valley of Mecca.
entries.definition_english:
وَأَيْدِيَكُمْ عَنْهُمْ بِبَطْنِ مَكَّةَ He it was who restrained their hands from you,
and your hands from them in the valley of Mecca.

entries.definition:
m–l–ʾ to fill up, capacity, surfeit; to be rich; leaders, notables;
groups of people; pleasing sight; to back up; to connive, to gang
up on someone; good character; outer garments. Of this root, six

892
